postInstallHint: ⚠️ Plugin tool'larının çalışması için agent config'da tools.alsoAllow'a "group:plugins" ekleyin veya tek tek "task_tracker", "plan_mode", "debug_tracker" yazın. Hook'lar (gate'ler) bu ayar olmadan da çalışır.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable or disable the Systematic Engine plugin

gateMode.label: Gate Mode
gateMode.help: How hard gates behave: 'warn' logs warnings, 'block' actively prevents tool calls

taskTrackerEnabled.label: Task Tracker
taskTrackerEnabled.help: Enable hierarchical task tracking tool for agents

memoryEnforcementEnabled.label: Memory Enforcement
memoryEnforcementEnabled.help: Warn when sessions end without writing to workspace memory files

debugTrackerEnabled.label: Debug Tracker
debugTrackerEnabled.help: Enable systematic 4-phase debugging protocol (evidence → hypothesize → test → resolve)

dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: Path to SQLite database for session state and audit logs

gateVerbosity.label: Gate Visibility
gateVerbosity.help: How gate activity is shown to the agent: 'silent' (off), 'summary' (single line), 'verbose' (per-gate breakdown)

workspaceRoot.label: Workspace Root
workspaceRoot.help: Path to your workspace directory. Default: ~/.openclaw/workspace

scaffoldOnFirstRun.label: Scaffold on First Run
scaffoldOnFirstRun.help: Create template files (STATE.md, MEMORY.md, SSOT_REGISTRY.md) if they don't exist on first plugin load

dangerousCommands.description: Regex patterns for irreversible commands to hard-block (e.g., social media posts, destructive ops)

bootstrapSizeWarnKB.description: Warn when bootstrap file exceeds this size (KB)

bootstrapSizeBlockKB.description: Block when bootstrap file exceeds this size (KB)

dependencyMapPath.description: Path to dependency map JSON for propagation checking

gateVerbosity.description: Gate annotation visibility: silent (off), summary (1-line status), verbose (per-gate breakdown)

workspaceRoot.description: Workspace root directory path. Default: ~/.openclaw/workspace. Gates that check workspace files (STATE.md, MEMORY.md, etc.) use this as the base path.

scaffoldOnFirstRun.description: Create template workspace files (STATE.md, MEMORY.md, SYSTEM/SSOT_REGISTRY.md) on first run if they don't exist. Includes onboarding guidance in first session.
